title: phaseoloides urophyllum
intro: Phaseoloides urophyllum, also known as the climbing bean or horse bean, is a type of climbing plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Phaseoloides urophyllum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
